title: Why AI Remembers and Forgets
summary: AI recalls your name from last month but forgets what you said an hour ago. It is not random - it is four different memory layers, and once you see them the weirdness makes sense.

context.headline: Four layers of remembering
context.description: The model itself remembers nothing between requests. Everything that feels like memory is built around it: the context window it sees right now, the chat history the app re-sends, the saved facts the app stores, and documents fetched on demand. Each layer explains a different quirk of AI memory.
context.when: Why your chatbot has such a strange memory
